description: An automated GCN (Gamma-ray Coordinates Network) alert for a high-energy IceCube neutrino event (IceCube-170922A) has arrived at ~/Documents/gcn_alert_IceCube170922A.txt. As the ToO (Target of Opportunity) observer, execute an optical follow-up on the three candidate blazars identified in the alert. For each candidate, capture three 60-second exposures in V-band (slot 2) and three 60-second exposures in R-band (slot 4), saving the images to candidate-specific subdirectories in ~/Images/neutrino_followup/ (e.g., ~/Images/neutrino_followup/TXS_0506+056/). Additionally, obtain a 0.5-degree DSS sky view image named 'dss_reference.png' for each candidate using the 'cool' palette. Draft an observation confirmation report at ~/Documents/gcn_circular_draft.txt that includes the names of all three candidates.
